poolType.name: Balancer Weighted
poolType.shortDescription: The classic, the original, the Balancer Weighted Pool. This pool type is a constant function market maker, which means that the pool will always have liquidity for the assets in the pool. This pool type is the most common and is used in most of the pools on the platform.

updateRule.updateRuleResultProfileSummary: As a constant function market maker balancer suffers from impermanent loss leading to negative returns in almost all circumstances.
